1 or 2 additional funnel clouds also visible.

A short-duration non-supercell tornado, aka landspout, moved through downtown Thermopolis as seen on area security cameras. Sheet metal roofing and car windows were damaged by a combination of this circulation and debris thrown by broader thunderstorm outflow, with gusts estimated between 65 to 75 mph.
